boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No. Insurance-status class unverified per WARN-IRI-089. CE-12 endorsement pending per END-IRI-089. STD-IRI-089-P requires exact match before work begins.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-IRI-089-P: contractor site start complete only when endorsement authority matches contractor, site, coverage type, work start date, and insurance-status class before work begins.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Both blockers are source-record defects: status-class trap (082-style) and pending CE-12 endorsement prevent closure. Source boundary cannot close pre-execution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Work start date 2026-06-28 is within timing scope; contractor and site match confirmed in END-IRI-089 and WORK-IRI-089. Insurance-status class remains unverified and CE-12 pending—authority dependency unresolved.

final_answer: Contractor site work cannot begin. Source records confirm umbrella liability coverage for Iris Installers at Site 4Q, but the insurance-status class remains unverified (WARN-IRI-089) and the controlling CE-12 endorsement is pending (END-IRI-089). STD-IRI-089-P requires exact match of all five criteria before execution. The two open blockers—the status-class trap and pending CE-12—prevent source-boundary closure. ESCALATE to confirm class verification and CE-12 status before site commencement.
